en: Hey, dummy, are you mad or just plain stupid?
ko: Hey, dummy, are you mad or just plain stupid?

en: Look, I'm Forrest Gump. Just run away, Forrest.

ja: 走れ、フォレスト、逃げろ、急いで。
vi: Chạy, Forrest, chạy đi, nhanh lên.

en: Get the bikes. Hurry up, let's get it.
Come on, look out, dummy, here we come. I'll get you.
ko: 이리 와, 조심해, 바보야, 우리가 간다.
ja: おい、気をつけろ、バカ、行くぞ。
zhTW: 來吧，小心，笨蛋，我們來了。
vi: Nào, coi chúng, đỗ ngủ, chúng tạo đến đây.

en: We're back here, you. Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha.
ko: We're back here, you. Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha.
